title: The Source Pool

features.name: eye-of-the-pool
features.desc-on-touch: concentric ripples, but they're not spreading outward—they're spiraling inward, pulling sound down into mist

features.name: mist-column
features.desc-on-touch: sound is rising as colour here—you can almost read what the water is saying, but it keeps changing language

features.name: origin-stone
features.desc-on-touch: a smooth pebble, impossibly old, covered in script that hasn't been invented yet. it feels like it's dreaming

features.name: reading-light
features.desc-on-touch: luminescence from the water itself. it's not coming from the pool—it's the pool remembering sunlight it will see tomorrow

inscription: checksum: emotionally valid / formally unstable—the pool doesn't hold water, it holds the dream of water remembering itself being read

file.name: RiverOrigin_Spectrogram_Incomplete.wav
file.note: sound recorded before it became sound. the file keeps rewriting its own timestamps

exits.label: further upstream, where water thinks it's made of sky
exits.to: NEW: the cloud-source, where the river learns it can evaporate into reading

exits.label: toward the weathered stand, where trees remember being young water
